dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, cruel fate has dealt us a terrible hand. {quest_origin} brought {quest_threat} to our fields, and now {quest_focus} are withering before our eyes.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: No one caused this on purpose. It is just bad luck, but {quest_stakes} will pay the price unless we {quest_action}. {quest_ally} heard that {quest_item} found {location_hint} might work as a remedy.
dialogueChunks.outro: We did nothing wrong and yet we suffer. Please help us fight back against this misfortune.

playerResponses.text: Bad luck is no reason to give up. I will find what you need.
A blight cure? That sounds like a long shot.
Some things cannot be fixed. I am sorry.

dialogueChunks.intro: It was not an attack, {player_name}. Just rotten timber and {quest_threat}. {quest_focus} gave way and now {quest_stakes} are cut off on the far side with no way to reach us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}, or they will be stranded for months. The {enemy_type} have moved into the gap {location_hint}, making it even harder. We need {quest_item} for the reconstruction.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those families have children. They cannot survive alone out there.

playerResponses.text: Stranded families need help. I will gather what you need.
Monsters in the riverbed and a deadline? Tough job.
They should have maintained the bridge.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat} from {quest_origin} buried our supply wagon on the road. {quest_focus} is wedged in the debris and {quest_stakes} are scattered across the hillside.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} before scavengers pick it clean. The {enemy_type} are already circling {location_hint}. Recover as many {quest_item} as you can find.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without {quest_stakes}, we face a long, cold season with empty shelves. You would earn {quest_reward_hint} for helping.

playerResponses.text: I will recover everything I can. No promises, but I will try.
A trader's favor could be useful. I am in.
Climbing through rubble with scavengers? Pass.
